question: What item is the person wearing a white sleeveless top holding above their head? A. Red and black backpack B. Bouquet of red flowers C. White surfboard D. Red life jacket
What is the color combination of the backpack carried by the person? A. Blue and black B. Green and black C. Red and black D. Blue and green
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a blue top and black pants carries a large red and black backpack while walking along a grassy bank next to a body of water. The individual uses black walking poles initially before wading through the shallow water where their reflection is visible. Dense green trees line the background behind the grassy edge.

question: How many black walking poles are visible?

Which of the previously seen people is back on screen? A. <person with dark hair, wearing a blue sleeveless top and black capri pants> B. <man with dark hair and beard, wearing a light blue sleeveless tank top> C. <person with short brown hair, wearing a light blue t-shirt with a tripod attached to their backpack> D. <person with dark hair, wearing a bright blue sleeveless tank top>

Did the person use BOTH walking poles AND wade through water? A. Only walking poles used B. Only waded through water C. Both walking poles and wading through water D. Neither walking poles nor wading through water

Where is the person wearing a blue top relative to the body of water when jumping off the bank? A. On the grassy bank B. Mid-air above the water C. Walking through shallow water D. Wading with water at waist level
Where is the large red and black backpack positioned relative to the person when the water reaches their waist? A. On their back B. In their hands C. Above their head D. On their shoulders
What action is the person wearing a blue top performing in the water? A. walking on grassy bank B. holding walking poles C. wading through river D. wearing backpack on back
Describe the sequence of actions the person performs while moving from the grassy bank into the water.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person walks on a grassy bank holding hiking poles; at 8s, the person jumps off the bank into the water while holding a backpack; at 12s, the person walks through shallow water with the backpack on their back; at 18s, the person holds the backpack above their head while wading deeper.

question: Has the person wearing the blue outfit placed the large red and black backpack on their back yet?

What change occurred regarding the person carrying the large red and black backpack between the earlier and later parts of the video? A. The person changed from wearing a blue outfit to wearing a green outfit B. The person walked out of the river onto the grassy bank C. The backpack was moved from overhead to the person's back D. The backpack was moved from the person's back to overhead

How has the person's position relative to the water changed from the start to the end of the video? A. Started wading in water, ended on dry land B. Started on grassy bank, ended wading through water C. Remained on the grassy bank throughout D. Remained in deep water throughout
What action does the person take after walking along the grassy bank?
canonical_answer: The person jumps off the grassy bank into the water.

question: What step came IMMEDIATELY before the person is seen balancing on a surfboard? A. Kneeling on a white surfboard B. Standing in a river wearing a backpack C. Holding a bouquet of flowers above water D. Jumping over a muddy puddle
Has the step 'jump into the water' been done by now?

What is the person's primary objective in this sequence? A. Fishing in the stream B. Crossing to the opposite bank C. Cooling off in the water D. Washing the backpack

Given what is visible so far, could the person wearing a blue short-sleeved shirt keep the large red and black backpack dry while crossing the river? A. No — water level is above the person's head B. Yes — backpack is held above head and water is at chest level C. No — backpack is submerged under the water D. No — person is not holding the backpack
